drills.title: Shadow-swing drill
drills.description: Slow-motion swings, no ball. Freeze at contact and check the arm shape before each finish.

drills.title: Turn-before-bounce drill
drills.description: Partner or wall feeds; say 'turn' out loud the moment the ball leaves the other side, shoulders fully turned before the bounce.

drills.title: Drop-feed contact drill
drills.description: Drop-feed yourself and catch the ball on the strings out in front; step and freeze the contact for one second.

drills.title: Chair-touch drill
drills.description: Rally while brushing a low chair or bench with your free hand between shots to keep the knees bent.

drills.title: Stuck-finish drill
drills.description: Hold every follow-through for two full seconds, balanced on the front foot, racket over the shoulder.

drills.title: Cross-coil drill
drills.description: Practice the takeback with the off hand on the racket throat; feel the shoulders coil past the hips before they release.

drills.title: Toss-and-reach drill
drills.description: Serve toss practice: toss, jump and catch the ball at full stretch above the front shoulder, no racket.

drills.title: Split-step metronome
drills.description: Shadow play: hop a small split step on every imaginary opponent hit; build the rhythm until it is automatic.

drills.title: Line-straddle drill
drills.description: Rally keeping both feet outside an imaginary line one racket-length wide; reset the wide base between shots.

drills.title: Cone-recovery drill
drills.description: After every shot, shuffle back around a center cone before the next feed; quick small steps, never crossing feet.

drills.title: Jump-reach contact drill
drills.description: Toss the ball to yourself and contact it at the highest point you can reach; focus on full arm extension above the shoulder.

drills.title: Wall-brace finish drill
drills.description: Stand side-on to a wall, execute slow-motion swings and hold the finish posture against the wall for two seconds.

drills.title: Trophy-position freeze drill
drills.description: Toss and pause at the trophy position — arm up, elbow at shoulder height, racket pointing up — hold for one second before swinging.

drills.title: Hip-first rotation drill
drills.description: Wrap a resistance band around your hips; initiate every swing by driving the hips forward first, letting the shoulders follow.

drills.title: Two-bounce prep drill
drills.description: Partner feeds; say 'turn' out loud as the ball crosses the net — shoulders must be fully turned before the ball bounces a second time.

drills.title: Short-backswing volley drill
drills.description: Stand at the net; keep the racket face in front of your body and punch through each volley with minimal backswing.

drills.title: Figure-eight footwork drill
drills.description: Set up two cones and move around them in a figure-eight pattern, landing in a balanced wide stance before each imaginary shot.

drills.title: Serve-target contact drill
drills.description: Place a target in the service box and serve aiming to hit it; emphasise reaching forward at contact rather than hitting down.

drills.title: Contact-posture balance drill
drills.description: Hold the contact position (knees bent, trunk upright) on one leg for five seconds between each practice swing.

drills.title: Backhand-coil drill
drills.description: Two-handed backhand: place the off-hand on the throat of the racket and rehearse a full shoulder coil past the hips before each swing.

drills.title: Slow-finish drill
drills.description: Hit every ball at fifty percent pace and freeze the follow-through for three full seconds, racket over the opposite shoulder.

drills.title: Split-and-move drill
drills.description: Partner calls a direction at random; split-step on every call and sprint to the cone before returning to centre.

drills.title: Mirror contact drill
drills.description: Hit towards a large mirror or reflective surface; watch that the contact point is out in front with the elbow slightly bent.

drills.title: Approach-and-recover drill
drills.description: Hit an approach shot and immediately take two shuffle steps back to the split-step position before the next ball is fed.

drills.title: Racquet-through-the-line drill
drills.description: Hit slow, deliberate strokes and feel the racquet head lead out toward the target through contact, finishing long down the line instead of flicking the wrist across the ball.

drills.title: Edge-on extension drill
drills.description: Shadow-swing turning the racquet so the top edge leads to the ball, then roll to a finish — grooves an on-line racquet path so the head never lags or flails through the hit.

drills.title: Racquet-tip-to-sky serve drill
drills.description: Serve focusing only on contacting at the very top of your reach with the racquet tip pointing at the sky; drive up from the legs so the frame is fully extended at the strike.
